_doc: Smoke queries for the VIPER Assist profile. Each query asserts that at least one expected_ids entry appears in the top_k results. Sourced from issue #74. Query 5 (Jenkins/Artifactory) from the issue is omitted because the current VIPER corpus producer does not yet emit CI/CD-platform rows; track that in VIPER_Dashboard corpus producer issues, not here.

queries.name: ad_smb_ldap_kerberos_winrm
queries.query: I found SMB, LDAP, Kerberos, and WinRM open on a Windows server. What should I look at first?

queries.name: web_app_no_creds
queries.query: I only have a web app URL and no credentials. What VIPER pages should I start with?

queries.name: nmap_common_ports
queries.query: Nmap shows 22, 80, 443, and 8080. I am not sure what tool to use next.

queries.name: domain_creds_no_admin
queries.query: I have domain credentials but no admin rights. What should I enumerate safely first?
